reach_why: Mostly restates familiar fallibilist cautions about appearance, introspection, and overstated impossibility arguments.
novelty_why: Connects AI self-report, thought-experiment form, and search-space rhetoric into one epistemic warning.
falsifiable_why: Counterexamples could show reliable self-reports, form-to-formal success, or valid impossibility arguments about real processes.
explanation: Persuasive form, self-report, and dramatic arguments are weaker evidence of truth than they seem.
